description: Spec is a document describing the interface of the step.

spec.description: Spec contains the inputs and outputs of the step.

inputs.description: Input describes a single step input.

type.description: Type is the value type of the input.

default.description: Default is the default input value. Its type must match `type`.

sensitive.description: Sensitive implies the input is of sensitive nature and effort should be made to prevent accidental disclosure.

outputs.description: Output describes a single step output.

type.description: Type is the value type of the output.

default.description: Default is the default output value.

sensitive.description: Sensitive implies the output is of sensitive nature and effort should be made to prevent accidental disclosure.
